case_title: HAMPTONS TAX AND BOOKKEEPING SERVICE VS MCKNEELY JESSIE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMPTONS TAX AND BOOKKEEPING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKNEELY JESSIE $795.00 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $893.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
